attributes.description: Alerts when the global lock is held more than 500 ms/sec on average. High lock time severely limits throughput.
attributes.name: [MongoDB OTel] Global lock contention

investigation_guide.blob:
## MongoDB global lock contention

### What fired
`RATE(mongodb.global_lock.time) > 500 ms/sec` during the window.

### Why it matters
MongoDB uses reader-writer locks at various scopes. Sustained high global lock time means operations are queued behind each other — throughput collapses.

### Triage
1. Look at write-heavy collections.
2. Check WT cache pressure.

### Remediation
- Shard to spread locking.
- Reduce write contention in hot collections.

### Tuning
- 500 ms/sec threshold; tune to workload.
